name: Apricot Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 small or 1 large box of apricot jello
1 large jar apricot baby food (8-10 oz)
1 can crushed pineapple, drained (16 oz), retain juice
1 cup pineapple juice (add water to juice retained to make a full cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix jello with 3 and 1/2 cups of water. Add baby food and pineapple. Chill until firm in an 11x14 inch pan.
2. Prepare DreamWhip as directed. Beat in cream cheese. Spread on jello and chill until firm.
3. Combine sugar, flour, egg, and butter. Cook until thick. Cool. Spread on top and chill. Pineapple in its own juice works best!
